heading: Clothing
label: 9562 Clothing
text: The President may prescribe the quantity and kind of clothing to be issued annually to members of the Air Force and members of the Space Force.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)956210:831.R.S. 1296 (less 1st 9 words).The words “members of the Air Force” are substituted for the words “troops of the United States”.
Amendments2021— inserted “and members of the Space Force” after “the Air Force”.Pub. L. 116–283
amendments: Amendments2021— inserted “and members of the Space Force” after “the Air Force”.Pub. L. 116–283
